subcodes.title: Words to Myron Phelps and Madame Canavarro in Dec. 1902
subcodes.first_line: The world of existence has two estates: the one is the Unconditioned, the Absolute, the Divine; the other is that of submission to God.
subcodes.subjects: @realms of being; three realms; five realms, @spiritual transformation, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within, @The Holy Spirit, @education and the development of capacity
